name: The Devil's Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 oz Olive or other salad oil
1 lb Kidney, pink or pinto beans - washed, sorted and soaked
3 large Tomatoes, chopped OR 1 can (15 oz) peeled tomatoes, 1 can (15 oz) tomato sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté onions, garlic, shallot, scallions, and green pepper in oil.
2. Add water, beans, and seasonings. Bring to a simmer.
3. Simmer for 1 1/2 hours until the beans are fork-tender.
4. Stir in tomatoes and tomato sauce.
5. Simmer for an additional 1 hour or until the mixture is thick and fragrant.
6. For spicier chili, use 2 or more cloves of garlic when sautéing initially.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve hot. Serves 6.
